rationale: WP-A: a successor of ring X supersedes a predecessor of a FOREIGN ring Y; the predecessor is attached and verifies under its own key (--related-pub), and X is a member of the pinned relation_signer set. Cross-issuer lineage VERIFIED + policy PASS. Set membership under the verifier's pins, never a proof of authority.
testKeys: fresh throwaway keys, generated by conformance/relation/generate_vectors.py
